channel.title: Security on Aneesh Mokashi
channel.description: Recent content in Security on Aneesh Mokashi

item.title: Jailbreaking Deep Models: Adversarial Attack Suite
item.author: aneeshkmokashi@gmail.com (Aneesh Mokashi)
item.description: Adversarial robustness experiments against ResNet-34 using FGSM, PGD, Momentum PGD, and Patch PGD
